info.name: Stripe Test Helpers API
info.description:
Stripe provides a number of resources for testing your integration. Use test helpers to simulate events and test your integration without using real payment methods.

Contact Support:
 Name: Stripe Dev Platform Team
 Email: dev-platform@stripe.com
